pages.title: Free-body diagrams
key_ideas: Draw every external force at its point of action
Do not draw internal forces for a single rigid body

pages.title: Newton's second law
key_ideas: Net force equals mass times acceleration for constant mass
Resolve forces into components before solving

pages.title: Dry friction
key_ideas: Static friction adjusts up to a maximum μ_s N
Sliding begins when required friction would exceed μ_s N
Kinetic friction ≈ μ_k N while sliding

pages.title: Work and kinetic energy
key_ideas: Work by a constant force aligned with displacement is F·d
